message:
fix(node): correct off-by-one boundary conditions in 5 comparison operators

Fixes a systematic class of boundary condition errors where strict
comparison (> or <) was used instead of inclusive comparison (>= or <=),
causing edge-case failures at exact threshold values.

Affected modules:
- conformance/protocol_harness.rs: Policy expiration now triggers at
  exactly the expiry timestamp, not one tick after
- connector/admission_budget.rs: Failed auth rejection now triggers at
  exactly the budget limit (e.g., 4th failure with max_failures=4)
- connector/cancellation_protocol.rs: Timeout detection now triggers at
  exactly the deadline, not one tick after
- connector/trust_fabric.rs: Convergence lag threshold and max degraded
  seconds checks now trigger at the exact configured limits
- security/vef_degraded_mode.rs: Heartbeat timeout and SLO breach
  detection now triggers at exactly the timeout value

All changes include updated test assertions verifying the boundary
behavior at the exact threshold.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
